## Summary

This repository is mirrored automatically from the Nouva Cloud monorepo.
Please open code changes in the monorepo instead of sending direct PRs here.

- if this PR only documents a release or packaging issue, describe it here
- otherwise, close this PR and reopen it against the monorepo source of truth

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check-types`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `docker build -f agent/Dockerfile .`

## Runtime Impact

- mounts changed:
- ports changed:
- environment variables changed:
- network behavior changed:
